response.overview: In a stereotypical secondary school classroom, with the typical friend groups. The Chavs. The Roadmen. The Nerds. The Theatre Kids. The Sport Kids. Then there is Parker. The Introvert of the class. she may not have many friends but she is not alone. Her only friend is... her thoughts. Inspired by Fleabag and writers personal experiences.
response.title: Mind of an Introvert
